name: Shoot Z
description: If you want to hone your accuracy and shooting skills, or just like to spend time playing exciting games, fiercely engage in virtual shooting at various targets. This is a great way to spend your free time having fun and at the same time benefit from pumping your accuracy.
instructions: hold your finger on the screen and hold to kill red person
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Gun, Kid, Kids, Kill, Killing, Shoot, Shooting, Sniper, Stickman, Unity3D
